questionHtml:
Calculate coefficients that balance the equation for the following reaction.

__ Mg3N2 (s) + __ H2O (l) → __ Mg(OH)2 (s) + __ NH3 (aq)

meta.title: Calculate coefficients that balance the equation for the following reaction. __ Mg3N2 (s) + __ H2O (l) → __ Mg(OH)2 (s) + __ NH3 (aq)
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
